reference_email: Dear Sir/Madam, thank you for the interview on Monday. I appreciated the opportunity to discuss the Backend Engineer position and would like to learn about the next steps in the process.
Hello, I am writing to request a brief extension on the current project deadline. The deadline is Friday, but due to an unexpected server issue, we need an additional three days to complete the work.

key_facts: Early access available for beta users
reference_email: Hi Team, I am thrilled to announce our product launch on July 1st. The new real-time collaboration feature will be available, and beta users can access early access starting next week.

Dear customer, we sincerely apologize for the two-hour service outage that affected all users. The issue was caused by a database migration failure, and we are taking immediate steps to prevent this from happening again.
Hello team, please join our weekly sync every Monday at 10 AM. We will cover the roadmap, blockers, and updates. Bring your status reports so we can keep everything aligned.
Dear Client, I am writing to confirm the presentation scheduled for next Wednesday in Conference Room B. Please bring the updated slide deck so we can review the latest details together.
Hi everyone, I am pleased to share that we completed the milestone ahead of schedule and passed all quality checks. Thank you to the team and stakeholders for your support.

key_facts: Needs review by end of week
reference_email: Hello, I submitted the proposal yesterday and would appreciate your review by the end of the week. I am open to any suggestions you may have.
Attention all staff: training is scheduled for June 28 on security best practices. Attendance is mandatory, so please mark your calendars.
This is urgent: a critical vulnerability has been found and requires an immediate patch. The security team has already been notified and is taking action.
